attributes.content:
## Overview

The Mermaid Diagram card gives the workspace a structured home for rendered Mermaid diagram card. Supports mindmaps, Gantt charts, flowcharts, SWOT analysis, sequence diagrams. Stores the Mermaid source and renders it live.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Mermaid Diagram usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Mermaid Diagram can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Note]]** -- Note can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Mermaid Diagram.
- **[[Article]]** -- Article can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Mermaid Diagram.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Mermaid Diagram into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Mermaid Diagram can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Mermaid Diagram can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Mermaid Diagram as the structured home for rendered Mermaid diagram card. Supports mindmaps, Gantt charts, flowcharts, SWOT analysis, sequence diagrams. Stores the Mermaid source and renders it live and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Mermaid Diagram when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Mermaid Diagram stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
